sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26427" key="didumhtoke/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐδῠμη-τοκέω</orth>, <sense id="n26427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bear twins,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:379" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Scymn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">379</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
